notes: Multiple coupon aggregator sites list Bartact codes. The codes LAURIE, BF200, FREESHIP2, and MOM15 were explicitly named in search snippets. Many sites claim high numbers of codes (13-25) but don't reveal them in snippets — actual code lists require visiting the pages. Knoji has a dedicated Bartact page with 4 active codes. Watched codes SAVE5 and WELCOME5 were NOT found exposed. No Bartact-specific pages found on retailmenot.com, wethrift.com, honey.com, or couponfollow.com.
